name: Tangy Cranberry Bread for Bread Machine
recipeInstructions:
Dried cranberries are sometimes called "ruby raisins." SUCCESS HINTS:
Place dried cranberries away from water if baking on delayed time cycle.
This recipe can be baked with regular or delayed time baking cycles.
CALORIES: 182 PROTEIN: 10% CHOLESTEROL: 5.3mg CARBOHYDRATES: 78%
